sql_array: SELECT event_time, try_strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) AS parsed_time FROM timestamps;
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = '14/04/2023 14:30:00' WHERE event_time = '04/15/2023 10:56:00';
SELECT event_time, try_strptime(event_time, ['%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S']) FROM timestamps WHERE parsed_time IS NOT NULL;
